Plether Protocol

Package-scoped Solidity reference documentation for the Plether monorepo. Each product is generated and searchable independently from the exact source revision shown below.

SharedCross-product interfaces, bases, and helpers. SpotPaired synthetics, staking, routing, oracles, and INVAR. OptionsCovered calls, margin, settlement, and DOV vaults. PerpsDelayed orders, clearing, LP tranches, and lenses.
